title: Big Globe Compat - Incendium
description: This datapack adds compatibility between Incendium and Big Globe.
body:
This datapack adds all the biomes, structures, and mobs to the terrain generation for Big Globe.
The Inverted Forest biome doesn't live up to it's name at the moment, as I didn't have a good way to generate inverted trees within Big Globe's system. The biome itself does still generate, just much more rarely than the other biomes, that way you can still get the advancements for finding it.
